interactive_prompts.name: trust_prompt
interactive_prompts.regex: Do you trust the contents of this project|Antigravity CLI requires permission
interactive_prompts.note: agy asks to trust dir on first launch; default selection is 'Yes, I trust this folder'

interactive_prompts.name: quota_exhausted
interactive_prompts.note: Distinguishable from transient rate-limit; usually requires plan upgrade

interactive_prompts.name: permission_prompt
interactive_prompts.note: Belt-and-suspenders alongside --dangerously-skip-permissions; harmless if bypass already accepted it

note: Interactive agy via tmux. Preserves Google AI Pro subscription billing (OAuth). REPL marker is the '? for shortcuts' footer text — unique to the idle state. agy has no CLI model selector.
